feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: Antman and Red entered Diglett's Cave as the physical detour around the sleeping Route 12 roadblock.

feed.speaker: Red
feed.text: Red is guarding the cave split and keeping Antman on the world route instead of relying on instant travel.

feed.speaker: Bill
feed.text: Bill mapped a Nexus relay running under Diglett's Cave, tying Route 11's signal to the eastern Kanto tunnel network.

feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: Rocket and Team Gold Dust were caught arguing over cave survey crates and mineral maps.

feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: The Route 12 road remains blocked by a sleeping Snorlax, confirming the cave detour is mandatory.

feed.speaker: Bill
feed.text: Bill flagged the Echo Flute as the next field-tool lead for waking sleeping roadblocks later in Kanto.
